rankings.reason: Best narrative; perfectly balances high-tech innovation with cultural aesthetics and a personalized, immersive traveler experience.
Highly efficient and functional, though it lacks the creative, sensory-rich storytelling found in Option A.
Creative concept, but the focus on class segregation and lack of airport atmosphere makes it less appealing.
Weakest entry; lacks futuristic vision and the writing style is informal and lacks professional polish.
